Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Im structuring a BPMN model with organizational pools and lanes setting up the Company as the main pool with separate lanes for each role like the AP Clerk Supervisor Purchasing Officer and Department Manager then defining the activities gateways and flows that connect them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now Im mapping out the core process starting with invoice receipt then a validation gateway to check for a valid PO number which branches into either returning the invoice to the supplier for missing details or logging it in the system

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For the no PO scenario Im distinguishing between two paths one where the AP Clerk sends it back to the supplier and another where the Supervisor escalates it to create a retrospective PO or reject it outright

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After that the invoice moves to Purchasing for goods receipt verification where another gateway compares the invoice details against the PO and if theres a mismatch it either goes to the Purchasing Officer to contact the supplier directly or back to AP to hold the invoice pending resolution

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Im also noting an overlap in the matching process theres ambiguity about whether AP or Purchasing performs the line item verification so Ill model it as a shared task with a note about the uncertainty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the workflow moves to manager approval where the system sends a notification and the manager can approve triggering payment scheduling reject ending the process or hold for investigation which loops back to the Supervisor and Manager for further review

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If escalation is needed the Supervisor coordinates the resolution

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now Im compiling the key artifacts involved throughout the process invoices POs receipts confirmations contracts and payment records and Ill present the complete workflow as textual flows with task IDs plus a compact indented representation and a pseudo BPMN outline to make the structure clear
